description_long: This is a compact, vintage-style car with a boxy silhouette and a weathered, yellowish paint finish. The body features two doors, slightly flared fenders, and chrome trim running along the sides and around the windows. The front end is characterized by a wide, rectangular grille flanked by two round headlights and a simple bumper. The rear has red, round taillights and a similarly styled bumper, with a trunk that slopes gently downward. The windows are tinted gray, and the wheels are small with basic hubcaps, giving the car an older, utilitarian appearance. The surface shows signs of age and wear, with visible rust and patina, suggesting long-term use in an urban environment.
description: A compact, vintage yellow car with a boxy shape, chrome trim, and visible weathering. It features two doors, round headlights, and a worn, aged exterior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide rectangular grille, two round headlights, and a weathered yellow hood.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the two-door design, chrome trim, and aged yellow paint with visible patina.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the sloped trunk, two round red taillights, and a simple rear bumper.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the boxy profile, chrome trim, and weathered surface.
attribute_headlight_design: dual round headlights, simple classic arrangement
